linux-gfx90a.blocked_reason: PORTED at fork c4b9b5b (real gfx90a code object). This session brought up the remaining ~15 non-JIT modules behind the prior 17-symbol residual and drove the cudf-internal undefined closure to EXACTLY 2 (the cudf::detail::binary_operation JIT pair; jitify->hipRTC is the documented separate effort). 9 new TUs added to cudf_hip_sources.cmake: stream_compaction/distinct_count.cu, quantiles/quantile.cu, quantiles/tdigest/{tdigest.cu,tdigest_aggregation.cu,tdigest_column_view.cpp}, groupby/sort/group_quantiles.cu, filling/repeat.cu, reshape/tile.cu, lists/stream_compaction/distinct.cu. libcudf.so = 559.46 MB (586,646,592 B), 151 embedded code objects ALL gfx90a, no -mcmodel=large, no split (--offload-compress stays on). GPU 18/18 on MI250X (GCD 0): prior 12 (no regression) + QuantileLinear, DistinctCount, RepeatTable, TileTable, ListsDistinct, TDigestReducePercentile, stable over repeated runs. Three new arch-unified fault-class fixes (CUDA byte-for-byte unchanged): (1) rocThrust zip-iterator + rocPRIM reduce_by_key need thrust::tuple not cuda::std::tuple at the algorithm boundary (file-local zip_tuple/zip_get/zip_make_tuple alias); (2) clang rejects an attribute between operator() and its param list (moved before operator()); (3) device_span::operator[] made CUDF_HOST_DEVICE on HIP (clang forbids a host+device fn calling a device-only callee; the tdigest CPU path indexes a device_span host-side). find_package(cudf) dependency-export contract added to cudf_hip.cmake + VERIFIED end-to-end (a separate find_package(cudf) project compiled a cudf TU as HIP, linked cudf::cudf resolving libcudf.so+librmm.so, ran make_numeric_column on gfx90a). This unblocks cugraph/cuml. src/io (nvCOMP/KvikIO) + the binaryop/transform/rolling JIT stay scoped out. See notes.md + PORTING_GUIDE.
